name: Water Festival (Dagu)
traditions: Water throwing and dousing; decorated pandals with music; visiting pagodas; washing Buddha images; merit-making.
historicalBackground: Mandalay's Thingyan celebrations are among Myanmar's most traditional, centered around the Mahamyatmuni Pagoda and the ancient royal city.
description: Mandalay's traditional water festival celebrations, combining sacred Buddhist rituals with joyous water-dousing at the ancient royal city.
